page.main: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pt-28 pb-20
page.breadcrumbNav: mt-6 mb-8 text-xs sm:text-sm text-[var(--seo-muted)] uppercase tracking-wide
page.headerImageWrap: relative h-[240px] sm:h-[280px] mb-6 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)]
page.headerOverlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent
page.headerTitleOnImage: absolute bottom-5 left-0 right-0 text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold text-[var(--seo-text)] px-4 drop-shadow-lg
page.headerDescription: font-body text-base text-[var(--seo-muted)] max-w-xl mx-auto leading-relaxed
page.mobileFilterBtn: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 bg-[var(--seo-glass-bg)] border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)] text-[var(--seo-text)] text-sm font-medium rounded-lg hover:bg-[var(--seo-surface)] transition-colors duration-200 backdrop-blur-xl
page.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm z-40 hidden lg:hidden
page.sidebar: w-full lg:w-72 flex-shrink-0 fixed lg:relative top-0 left-0 h-full lg:h-auto bg-[var(--seo-surface)]/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-[var(--seo-glass-border)] z-40 lg:z-auto transform -translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0 transition-transform duration-200 ease-in-out lg:block
page.sidebarTitle: font-body text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-[var(--seo-text)]
page.closeBtn: p-2 hover:bg-[var(--seo-glass-bg)] rounded-lg transition-colors duration-150 text-[var(--seo-muted)] hover:text-[var(--seo-text)]
page.filterSidebarRoot: bg-[var(--seo-glass-bg)] rounded-lg border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)] p-6 backdrop-blur-xl
page.sortDropdownSelect: appearance-none bg-[var(--seo-glass-bg)] border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 pr-8 font-body text-sm font-medium text-[var(--seo-text)] hover:border-[var(--seo-accent)]/50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--seo-accent)] focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-150 cursor-pointer backdrop-blur-xl
page.topBar: flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-3 mb-6
page.countText: font-body text-xs sm:text-sm text-[var(--seo-muted)] uppercase tracking-wide
page.viewToggleGroup: flex items-center gap-0.5 rounded-lg border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)] p-0.5 bg-[var(--seo-glass-bg)]
page.listBtn: p-2 rounded-md text-[var(--seo-muted)] hover:text-[var(--seo-text)] transition-colors duration-150
page.mobileCount: font-body text-xs text-[var(--seo-muted)] uppercase tracking-wide mb-4 sm:hidden
page.productGrid: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-5 lg:gap-6 items-start collection-product-grid
page.loadMoreBtn: bg-[var(--seo-glass-bg)] border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)] text-[var(--seo-text)] px-6 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-[var(--seo-surface)] transition-colors duration-200 font-medium backdrop-blur-xl
page.emptyWrap: text-center py-16 bg-[var(--seo-glass-bg)] rounded-2xl border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)] backdrop-blur-xl
page.paginationPrev: px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-150 bg-[var(--seo-glass-bg)] border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)] text-[var(--seo-muted)] hover:text-[var(--seo-text)] hover:bg-[var(--seo-surface)]
page.paginationNext: px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-150 bg-[var(--seo-glass-bg)] border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)] text-[var(--seo-muted)] hover:text-[var(--seo-text)] hover:bg-[var(--seo-surface)]

header.container: text-center mb-16 relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)]

card.noImagePlaceholder: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-[var(--seo-muted)]

quickAddButton.base: absolute bottom-2 left-2 right-2 bg-[var(--seo-gradient-accent)] text-[var(--seo-text)] py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-opacity duration-200

pagination.container: flex justify-between items-center bg-[var(--seo-glass-bg)] rounded-lg border border-[var(--seo-glass-border)] p-4 backdrop-blur-xl
pagination.button: flex items-center space-x-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-150 text-[var(--seo-muted)] hover:text-[var(--seo-text)]
